name: Podcasts
description: Manage podcast subscriptions with automatic RSS feed updates, episode downloads, auto-delete after listening, and daily auto-playlist generation.
overview: Subscribe to podcast RSS feeds, automatically download new episodes, manage auto-deletion of listened content, and generate a daily auto-playlist of unlistened episodes.

versions.changelog:
- Initial release
- RSS feed subscription management
- Configurable update frequency (daily, weekly, monthly)
- Auto-download of new episodes
- Cover image extraction as folder.jpg
- Auto-delete after 2 days of listening
- Daily auto-playlist generation
- Podcast detection via playback events
